findings.comment: T015 is marked done on the strength of the new production-path reviewer integrity guard, but the only digest-matched implementer evidence injected for this reviewed tree covers bounded-verification.Tests.ps1 (11 tests), an opt-in helper that the production orchestrator explicitly never calls. The claimed 7/7 orchestrator-reviewer-integrity result appears only in this hand-authored table, which the review contract gives zero evidence standing. Record the production-path suite (or a focused subset proving mutation failure, allowed findings output, and no auto-verification) through the digest-bound recorder before treating T015/FR-010 as verified.

The worktree-visible maintainer decision in state.md says option 1 removed automatic bounded verification and made the helper opt-in, but the authoritative iteration plan still marks 'REQUIRED bounded in-worktree verification' done and drift-log.md records only the unrelated tracker-parser drift. Reconcile the plan/design wording and record this approved design change in the drift log so the done claim describes what actually shipped; the visible maintainer decision prevents this from being blocking.
